test1_embedding_path_consistency.note: enroll embed_bgr == eval embed_bgr == capture_and_score embedding

smoking_gun.interpretation: faces/driver1.enc was the L2-mean of center-crop embeddings of enroll JPGs (Haar-miss fallback path in embed_bgr), not Haar face crops. Voice template from the same enroll run matches enroll wav mean at cos=1.000. Eval now Haar-detects 8/8 enroll and 22/22 new genuines, so probe embeddings are tight face crops that are far from the center-crop template (cos≈0.37–0.44).

test2_template_staleness.action: Re-enrolled faces/driver1.enc from 22 new close-up genuine JPGs (Haar-OK). Old template backed up.

counterfactual_haar_enroll_folder_reenro.note: If template rebuilt from Jul15 enroll/ via Haar crops (not what we wrote; written from new genuines per prompt)

test2_template_staleness.caveat: AFTER genuine_mean is partly in-sample (template built from same 22 genuines). Counterfactual using Jul15 enroll/ Haar mean also resolves inversion without that bias (g=0.804 > a=0.626).
